issues.detail: The instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases.

scenarios.name: Port a pandas cohort retention script to BigQuery via Ibis
scenarios.rationale: Baseline keeps pandas and pulls all rows into memory; treatment uses ibis.bigquery.connect, builds a lazy expression with group_by/mutate/agg, prints ibis.to_sql, and calls .execute() so aggregation is pushed to the warehouse.

scenarios.name: Portable DAU + revenue-per-plan module on DuckDB locally, Snowflake in prod
scenarios.rationale: Baseline writes backend-specific code with pandas; treatment factors a get_connection() helper, wires DuckDB+read_parquet for dev and ibis.snowflake.connect for prod, and reuses the same Ibis expression functions across both backends.
